message:
refactor(writing): de-slopify wills article copy

Systematic /de-slopify pass — replace emdashes with semantic alternatives
(colons for definition, parentheses for parenthetical asides, commas or
periods for sentence-joiners), never by regex. Each of 68 sites reviewed
for context; recast where a direct substitution would read awkwardly.

Area reviewed: components/wills-estate-article.tsx (2716 lines, article
body). No tone edits beyond punctuation: Jeffrey-voice markers untouched
("\$20/month", "chaotic family", "your parrot", rhetorical "is not",
"the whole thing").

Validation: bun tsc --noEmit clean; no JSX breakage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
